title: T-023 — POST /api/production/scanner/consume-to-wo endpoint (basic happy path)
prompt:
# T-023 — POST /scanner/consume-to-wo (happy path)

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.2 FR-08-E2-001..003, §8.2.2, §16.4 V-PROD-02

## Goal
Implement consume-to-WO endpoint validating WO state, LP state, BOM component match, then writing wo_material_consumption + reducing LP qty (05-WH integration stub).

## Implementation contract
App Router POST /api/production/scanner/consume-to-wo. Zod body {transaction_id: uuid, wo_id: uuid, lp_id: uuid, qty_consumed: number(>0), operator_id: uuid, fefo_suggested_lp_id?: uuid}. withIdempotency. Atomic transaction: assert WO.status='IN_PROGRESS', LP.status IN ('AVAILABLE','LOCKED') (V-PROD-02), LP.qa_status='PASSED', LP.product matches some BOM component_id of this WO. Compute fefo_adherence_flag = (lp_id == fefo_suggested_lp_id). INSERT wo_material_consumption row (over_consumption_flag=false at this stage — checked in T-024). Call 05-WH adapter to reduce LP.qty (interface stub). Return 200 {consumption_id, new_lp_qty, fefo_adherence_flag, over_consumption_requires_approval:false}.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/production/scanner/consume-to-wo/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/scanner/consume-to-wo/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/consume-to-wo.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/integrations/warehouse-lp-adapter.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given WO IN_PROGRESS and LP AVAILABLE+PASSED matching BOM component, when POST consume-to-wo with qty within plan, then 200 + consumption_id + fefo_adherence_flag matching match-vs-suggestion
2. Given LP.qa_status='HOLD', when POST, then 409 with error code 'lp_qa_not_passed' (V-PROD-02 + FR-08-E2-001)
3. Given LP.product not in WO BOM, when POST, then 409 with error code 'component_not_in_bom'

## Test strategy
- RED: route test asserting happy + qa_hold reject + bom mismatch reject before route exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scanner.*consume-to-wo'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow consumption from CONSUMED LPs (V-PROD-02)
- Do not skip qa_status check
- Do not split consumption + LP qty reduce across two transactions

pipeline_inputs.description: POST /scanner/consume-to-wo endpoint: validates WO/LP/BOM, writes wo_material_consumption, reduces LP qty.
pipeline_inputs.details: Atomic transaction: validate WO+LP+BOM, INSERT consumption row (over_consumption=false initial), call warehouse-lp-adapter to reduce LP qty. fefo_adherence_flag computed by comparing lp_id to fefo_suggested_lp_id. Genealogy write deferred to T-025. Outbox emit deferred to T-041.

Given LP qa_status='HOLD', when POST, then 409 lp_qa_not_passed
Given LP product not in WO BOM, when POST, then 409 component_not_in_bom
